project_area: Racial justice organizing, activism, and community building in Maine, with a focus on dismantling white supremacy, settler colonialism, and racialized capitalism
demographic_requirements: BIPOC-led and/or BIPOC-serving organizations, with priority given to Black and Wabanaki-led groups. Organizations must meet at least two of three BIPOC leadership criteria (staff, board, organizers) for the past two years.
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants must work exclusively or primarily in Maine, serve BIPOC communities, be BIPOC-led (with specific criteria), implement racial justice programs, and have an operating budget under $2.5M (exceptions for Wabanaki Tribal entities).
